creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
Sorry, only affects FreeBSD 9:

# pkg info -dr nghttp2
nghttp2-0.7.15
Depends on     :
	spdylay-1.3.2
	libxml2-2.9.2_2
	openssl-1.0.2_1
	gcc-4.8.4_3
	libevent2-2.0.22_1
	libev-4.15_1,1
	jansson-2.7
	boost-libs-1.55.0_5
Required by    :
	curl-7.42.1

On FreeBSD 10 looks ok:

# pkg info -dr nghttp2
nghttp2-0.7.15
Depends on     :
        spdylay-1.3.2
        libxml2-2.9.2_2
        openssl-1.0.2_1
        libevent2-2.0.22_1
        libev-4.15_1,1
        jansson-2.7
        boost-libs-1.55.0_5
Required by    :
        curl-7.42.1
